para_trans: Joint Director, Office at the Directorate of Vocational Education and Training, Vocational Education and
Training / Chairman, Maharashtra State Board of Vocational Education Examination,
Maharashtra Education Service Group-A (TAS) (W) cadre officers. 01/1/2026 of the final day of the trial.
Government of Maharashtra
Department of Skills, Employment, Entrepreneurship and Innovation,
Government Circular No: SEGSU-2023 / (Q.63) / VISHI-1
Mantralaya, 2nd Floor, Main Building, Mumbai-400 032.
Date: 25th March, 2026
Read: - (1) General Administration Department, Government Notification No. SRV-2016 / Pr. No.281 / XII, D. 21/06/2021
(2) Department of Skill Development, Employment and Entrepreneurship, Government Circular No. Sejaysu-
(3) Director, Directorate of Vocational Education and Training, Maharashtra State, Mumbai
His letter No.3 / Aastha-1 / JSU / Group (A) (T) (T) (W) / 2025/109
Circular:
Joint Director, Directorate of Vocational Education and Training, Vocational Education and Training /
Chairman, Maharashtra State Board of Vocational Education Examination, Maharashtra Education Service, Group-A (s) (w)
Officers of the cadre. The reference to the seasonal calendar of 01/01/2026 is No. (2) Here.
The circular has been issued.
2. Reference No. (2) The seasonal orders issued by the Government Circular hereunder.
Give due consideration to the submissions received in the context. Service availability list for 01/01/2026
The final form is being published as the accompanying "Form-A."
3. This Government Circular is available on the website of the Government of Maharashtra www.maharashtra.gov.in.
